intro.body: Al-Hayaat School is set to open its doors in September 2026, offering a faith-based, high-quality education for the Kitchener-Waterloo community. Our carefully phased growth plan ensures a strong foundation for the school's future:

openingPlan.heading: Set to open

phases.content: Opening with Junior Kindergarten (JK) to Grade 3.
Adding one grade each year until reaching Grade 8 in 2031.

openingPlan.note: This gradual development allows us to focus on creating a robust academic and spiritual environment tailored to each age group.

community.heading: Connect with our community
community.body: With a blend of modern facilities and values, Al-Hayaat School is dedicated to nurturing the next generation of leaders, innovators, and contributors to society. Join us on this journey to build a strong, faith-centered community.

mission.heading: Support Our Mission
points: Covering essential school costs and daily learning
Ensuring a high-quality education system rooted in principles.

cta.heading: Join Our Community
cta.body: Together, we're building a brighter future for our children and the community.
